scripts.tauri:probe:clear: node scripts/tauri-preflight.mjs && env VITE_TRANSPARENCY_PROBE=clear tauri dev
scripts.tauri:probe:panel: node scripts/tauri-preflight.mjs && env VITE_TRANSPARENCY_PROBE=panel tauri dev
scripts.tauri:probe:solid: node scripts/tauri-preflight.mjs && env VITE_TRANSPARENCY_PROBE=solid tauri dev
